All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
ApplicationException
 
BaseBean
The BaseBean class serves as a base entity for all beans in the application.
BaseCtl
 
ChangePasswordCtl
 
CollegeBean
CollegeBean represents the college entity.
CollegeCtl
 
CollegeListCtl
 
CollegeModel
Handles all database operations for College.
CourseBean
CourseBean represents a course entity in the system.
CourseCtl
 
CourseListCtl
 
CourseModel
Handles all database operations related to Course.
DatabaseException
 
DataUtility
 
DataValidator
 
DropdownListBean
DropdownListBean is a common interface implemented by all beans that are used in dropdown lists.
DuplicateRecordException
 
EmailBuilder
 
EmailMessage
 
EmailUtility
 
FacultyBean
FacultyBean represents the details of a faculty member.
FacultyCtl
 
FacultyListCtl
 
FacultyModel
FacultyModel manages all CRUD operations for the st_faculty table.
GetMarksheetCtl
 
HTMLUtility
 
JDBCDataSource
 
LoginCtl
 
MarksheetBean
MarksheetBean stores marksheet details of a student.
MarksheetCtl
 
MarksheetListCtl
 
MarksheetMeritListCtl
 
MarksheetModel
MarksheetModel handles all operations related to the st_marksheet table.
MyProfileCtl
 
ORSView
 
PropertyReader
 
RecordNotFoundException
 
RoleBean
RoleBean represents different user roles in the system.
RoleCtl
 
RoleListCtl
 
RoleModel
RoleModel handles all CRUD operations related to the st_role table.
ServletUtility
 
StudentBean
StudentBean represents a student entity in the application.
StudentCtl
 
StudentListCtl
 
StudentModel
StudentModel handles all database operations related to student records.
SubjectBean
SubjectBean represents a subject entity.
SubjectCtl
 
SubjectListCtl
 
SubjectModel
SubjectModel handles all database operations related to subjects.
TestCollegeModel
 
TestCourseModel
 
TestEmailUtility
 
TestFacultyModel
 
TestMarksheetModel
 
TestRoleModel
 
TestStudentModel
 
TestSubjectModel
 
TestTimetableModel
 
TestUserModel
 
TimetableBean
TimetableBean represents an exam timetable entry.
TimetableCtl
 
TimetableListCtl
 
TimetableModel
TimetableModel handles all database operations related to timetable entries.
UserBean
UserBean is a JavaBean class that represents a User entity.
UserCtl
UserCtl is a controller servlet that handles user-related operations such as registration, update, form validation and preloading role list for the view.
UserListCtl
UserListCtl handles listing, searching, pagination and bulk actions for User entities.
UserModel
UserModel class handles all database operations related to User.
UserRegistrationCtl
 
WelcomeCtl
